name: ONE Group Hospitality, Inc.
summary: ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. (ticker: STKS) is a hospitality company that develops and operates upscale and polished casual dining restaurants and lounges. The company is known for its STK steakhouse brand, offering a modern dining experience. It operates owned, managed, and licensed food and beverage venues across various locations.
